ruleset_used.description: Name of the ruleset used for analysis
ruleset_used.title: Ruleset Used

llm_validation_enabled.description: Whether LLM validation was enabled for this analysis
llm_validation_enabled.title: Llm Validation Enabled

analysis_timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the analysis was performed
analysis_timestamp.title: Analysis Timestamp

evidence_context_size.description: Size of context used for evidence extraction
evidence_context_size.title: Evidence Context Size

BaseFindingEvidence.description: Evidence item with content and collection timestamp.
BaseFindingEvidence.title: BaseFindingEvidence

GDPRServiceIntegrationFindingMetadata.description:
Metadata for GDPR service integration classification findings.

Extends BaseFindingMetadata which provides:
- source: str - Source file or location where the data was found
- context: dict[str, object] - Extensible context for pipeline metadata

source.description: Source file or location where the data was found
source.title: Source

context.description: Extensible context for pipeline metadata (connector_type, artifact_id, etc.)
context.title: Context

GDPRServiceIntegrationFindingMetadata.title: GDPRServiceIntegrationFindingMetadata

GDPRServiceIntegrationFindingModel.description:
GDPR service integration classification finding structure.

Represents a service integration indicator that has been enriched with
GDPR-specific classification information. Contains both the original
indicator fields and the GDPR assessment.

Inherits from BaseFindingModel[GDPRServiceIntegrationFindingMetadata] which provides:
- id: str - Unique identifier (auto-generated UUID)
- evidence: list[BaseFindingEvidence] - Evidence items with content
- matched_patterns: list[PatternMatchDetail] - Patterns that matched
- metadata: GDPRServiceIntegrationFindingMetadata - Required metadata with source
- require_review: bool | None - Whether this finding requires human review

evidence.description: Evidence items with content and timestamps for this finding
evidence.title: Evidence

matched_patterns.description: Patterns that were matched during analysis with occurrence counts
matched_patterns.title: Matched Patterns

metadata.description: Metadata with source and context information

require_review.description: Whether this finding requires human review. Only present when True.
require_review.title: Require Review

service_integration_purpose.description: Purpose category from the service integration detection rule (e.g., 'operational', 'analytics')
service_integration_purpose.title: Service Integration Purpose

typical_lawful_bases.description: Typical GDPR Article 6 lawful bases for this service integration
typical_lawful_bases.title: Typical Lawful Bases

sensitive_purpose.description: Whether this service integration's purpose is privacy-sensitive
sensitive_purpose.title: Sensitive Purpose

dpia_recommendation.description: DPIA recommendation level for this service integration
dpia_recommendation.title: Dpia Recommendation

GDPRServiceIntegrationFindingModel.title: GDPRServiceIntegrationFindingModel

GDPRServiceIntegrationSummary.description: Summary statistics for GDPR service integration classification findings.

total_findings.description: Total number of classified service integration findings
total_findings.title: Total Findings

gdpr_purpose_categories.description: Count of findings per GDPR purpose category
gdpr_purpose_categories.title: Gdpr Purpose Categories

sensitive_purposes_count.description: Number of findings with sensitive purposes
sensitive_purposes_count.title: Sensitive Purposes Count

dpia_required_count.description: Number of findings where DPIA is required
dpia_required_count.title: Dpia Required Count

requires_review_count.description: Number of findings that require human review
requires_review_count.title: Requires Review Count

GDPRServiceIntegrationSummary.title: GDPRServiceIntegrationSummary

PatternMatchDetail.description:
Detail about a matched pattern including occurrence count.

This structured type replaces simple pattern strings to provide
richer information about how many times each pattern was found,
which is useful for auditing and confidence assessment.

match_count.description: Number of times this pattern matched in the content
match_count.title: Match Count

PatternMatchDetail.title: PatternMatchDetail

description:
Complete output structure for gdpr_service_integration schema.

This model represents the full wire format for GDPR service integration
classification results, including findings enriched with GDPR-specific
information, summary statistics, and analysis metadata.

findings.description: List of service integration findings with GDPR classification
findings.title: Findings

summary.description: Summary statistics of the GDPR classification analysis

title: GDPRServiceIntegrationFindingOutput
